time_h: # Digitized from Maaland MG et al. J Clin Microbiol 2014;52(1):90-98
# Curve digitized: 8xMIC (registry scenario 0.5 mg/L = 8 x MIC50 0.063 mg/L).
# value = log10 CFU/mL. Decade gridlines 1E+00..1E+07 read at ~40 px/decade.
# Bacteriostatic: ~1 log net reduction at 24 h (treated curves 2x-16x cluster

value: so ~+/-0.3 log uncertainty). The point of

time_h: #   this dataset is that the model must NOT predict bactericidal (>=3 log) kill.
